name: trace-viewer
title: Trace Viewer
description: An interactive timeline viewer for trace spans, markers, search, zooming, and detail inspection.

files.content:
import type { ReactNode } from 'react';

export function IconZoomIn({ size = 16 }: { size?: number }): ReactNode {
  return (
    <svg width={size} height={size} viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden>
      <title>Zoom In</title>
      <path
        d="M11 19a8 8 0 1 0 0-16 8 8 0 0 0 0 16Z"
        stroke="currentColor"
        strokeWidth="2"
      />
      <path
        d="M11 8v6M8 11h6"
        stroke="currentColor"
        strokeWidth="2"
        strokeLinecap="round"
      />
      <path
        d="M20 20l-3.5-3.5"
        stroke="currentColor"
        strokeWidth="2"
        strokeLinecap="round"
      />
    </svg>
  );
}

export function IconZoomOut({ size = 16 }: { size?: number }): ReactNode {
  return (
    <svg width={size} height={size} viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden>
      <title>Zoom Out</title>
      <path
        d="M11 19a8 8 0 1 0 0-16 8 8 0 0 0 0 16Z"
        stroke="currentColor"
        strokeWidth="2"
      />
      <path
        d="M8 11h6"
        stroke="currentColor"
        strokeWidth="2"
        strokeLinecap="round"
      />
      <path
        d="M20 20l-3.5-3.5"
        stroke="currentColor"
        strokeWidth="2"
        strokeLinecap="round"
      />
    </svg>
  );
}

export function IconMinus({ size = 16 }: { size?: number }): ReactNode {
  return (
    <svg width={size} height={size} viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden>
      <title>Minus</title>
      <path
        d="M6 12h12"
        stroke="currentColor"
        strokeWidth="2"
        strokeLinecap="round"
      />
    </svg>
  );
}

light.font-mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, Liberation Mono, monospace

dark.font-mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, Liberation Mono, monospace
